nasb.text: and he, having received such a command, threw them into the inner prison and fastened their feet in the stocks.

esv.text: Having received this order, he put them into the inner prison and fastened their feet in the stocks.

cnv.text: 獄吏領了命令，就把他們押入內監，兩腳拴了木狗。

ccb.text: 狱卒接到命令后把他们关进内牢，双脚上了枷锁。

csbs.text: 狱卒领了这样的吩咐，就把他们投进了监狱里的最里层，把他们的两脚铐在木枷上。
